title: PG Website Builder: Urgent owner request. Attempt direct GitHub upload to private repo https://githu
prompt:
Urgent owner request. Attempt direct GitHub upload to private repo https://github.com/XposeMarket/Prometheus for website files ONLY.

Scope rules (strict):
- Include only website artifacts from `teams/team_mn74d1g9_0f4d45/workspace/website-week1-nextjs/` plus website docs:
  - website-week1-implementation-checklist.md
  - website-week1-page-structure.md
  - website-week1-component-map.md
  - website-week1-section-copy-blocks.md
- In repo, place as:
  - `website/` (Next.js files)
  - `website/docs/` (the 4 docs)
- Exclude everything else (X queue, KPI, execution handoffs, product bible, etc.).

Execute:
1) Clone/pull repo.
2) Copy only allowed files.
3) git add website
4) commit: `feat: add week-1 prometheus website scaffold and docs`
5) push to default branch (or create branch + PR if protected)

Return:
- success/failure
- branch + commit hash (or PR URL)
- exact committed file list
- confirmation exclusions were respected
- exact blocker text if failed.
